C

callAbandoned(SipServletRequest) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
This method is called in response to receiving a CANCEL request.
callAbandoned(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
 
callAnswered(SipServletResponse) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
Called after a 200 OK is received.
callAnswered(SipServletResponse) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
 
Callback<T> - Interface in org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow
 
callCompleted(SipServletRequest) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
This method is called after receiving a BYE request.
callCompleted(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
 
callConnected(SipServletRequest) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
This method is called after the ACK for the initial INVITE is received.
callConnected(SipServletRequest) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
 
callDeclined(SipServletResponse) - Method in interface org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaListener
This method is called after receiving an error status (like 404).
callDeclined(SipServletResponse) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.B2buaServlet
 
callEvent(SipServletMessage) - Method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.AsyncSipServlet
Override this method to handle call events that may fall outside the scope of your defined callflows.

Called upon an initial INVITE.

Cancel - Class in org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua
 
Cancel() - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.Cancel
Implements the CANCEL callflow with no callback hooks.
Cancel(B2buaServlet) - Constructor for class org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua.Cancel
Implements the CANCEL callflow with callback hooks for objects implementing the B2buaListener interface.

copyHeaders(SipServletRequest, SipServletRequest) - Static method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER requests.
copyHeaders(SipServletResponse, SipServletResponse) - Static method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
Copy non-system headers with the exception of Contact for REGISTER responses, 3xx and 485 responses, and 200/OPTIONS responses.
copyParameters(URI, URI) - Static method in class org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow.Callflow
Copy any parameters (that do not already exist) from one URI to another.
